heroTitle: Tell us where AI is stuck at your company.
heroLede: We'll set up a 30-minute call. If the retainer makes sense, we go from there. If you're after an expert call or a workshop, same. And if we're not the right people, we'll tell you.
notSureAfter: page first if you like. Either way, feel free to write — we read every email.
successBody: Thanks for writing — we read every email and we'll get back to you. If we're not the right fit, we'll tell you that too.
